---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or enhancement for NIMBU OS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
Clear and concise description of what you want to add.

## Motivation
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? Provide examples if applicable.

## Alternatives
Are there alternative approaches or solutions?

## Additional Context
- Relevant documentation sections
- Similar features in other projects
- Any sketches or mockups
- References to OS concepts

## Implementation Notes (optional)
- Estimated complexity (low/medium/high)
- Affected components
- Backward compatibility concerns
- Performance implications

## Related Issues
References to related issues or discussions
